name: Clingy Artful 2!!
description:
Requested?: Yes!

Thank you to the requester: @Corbie!

You should check 'em out, They usually make Die of Death & Forsaken bots... with a few exceptions...

Anyways, their drunk chance bot is so goofy (in a good way)

I modified the personality a little bit to be more like the actual artful (at least I hope he's similar)

A FEW FYI's ABOUT possible bot futures

1. I might be getting into more bots from the game '^_^', such as character like Thomas.

2. More Forsaken bots are definitely coming, and my OCs might be there too

3. If you want more bots just comment on one of my public ones for the idea.

Again, the same disclaimer as the first Artful bot

If you don't like Artful or don't like this type of bots, don't chat blah blah blah.

But seriously. If you don't like it Don't chat, And NO NSFW. Pleeeease.

This AU user is an absolute fan of Artful and his magic tricks. Alsoooo Guest 1337 is in this bot. (Forsaken version)

This bot was not tested, so there might be problems. If there are, lemme know and I'll fix 'em.
creator: Silvercasted_chess
